Football: UEFA Conference League - match: AC Sparta Prague - Raków Częstochowa
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Rayo Vallecano - Lech Poznań
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: KF Shkendija - Jagiellonia Białystok
programme.desc: The Pride of Podlasie started the league phase of the youngest UEFA competition with a modest victory over Hamrun Spartans 1-0.In the second round, Adrian Siemieniec's players faced the strong RC Strasbourg, drawing with them away 1-1.Now they are on a delegation to Skopje.KF Shkendija has a 0-2 defeat against Rayo Vallecano and a 1-0 victory over Shelbourne FC.Jagiellonia will be the favorite in the match at the stadium.Todor Proeski.Let's hope it plays its role better than the Lech Poznań players in the confrontation with Lincoln Red Imps from Gibraltar.

programme.desc: The hosts have not won an international match for a long time.They last enjoyed victory in June 2024, beating Kazakhstan 3-2.Since then, they have suffered 12 defeats and 3 draws.

Football: UEFA Conference League - match: KF Shkendija - Jagiellonia Białystok
programme.desc: The Pride of Podlasie started the league phase of the youngest UEFA competition with a modest victory over Hamrun Spartans 1-0.In the second round, Adrian Siemieniec's players faced the strong RC Strasbourg, drawing with them away 1-1.Now they are on a delegation to Skopje.KF Shkendija has a 0-2 defeat against Rayo Vallecano and a 1-0 victory over Shelbourne FC.Jagiellonia will be the favorite in the match at the stadium.Todor Proeski.Let's hope it plays its role better than the Lech Poznań players in the confrontation with Lincoln Red Imps from Gibraltar.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Lech Poznań - FC Lausanne-Sport
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Raków Częstochowa - SK Rapid Wien
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Legia Warszawa - AC Sparta Prague
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Jagiellonia Białystok - KuPS Kuopio
programme.desc: At the halfway point of the regular phase of the Conference League, Pride of Podlasie is in thirteenth place, which guarantees seeding in the play-off phase.Adrian Siemieniec's players remain undefeated, but they cannot be proud of their last performance.They only drew 1-1 with Macedonian Shkendija and scored the equalizing goal in the tenth minute of added time.Jagiellonia has a match against KuPS Kuopio, which, like itself, has five points.The Finnish team will take to the field in Białystok encouraged by their 3-1 victory over Slovan Bratislava in the previous round.

programme.title: UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.sub-title: Lech Poznań - Sporting Braga 17.02.2011 - sezon 2010/2011
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.sub-title: Wisła Kraków - Twente 14.12.2011 - sezon 2011/2012

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - match: AZ Alkmaar - Jagiellonia Białystok
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Omonia FC - Raków Częstochowa
programme.desc: The Medals are one of three teams in the Conference League that have not yet been defeated in the regular round.The Częstochowa team has already secured their place in the knockout phase, but they do not intend to be satisfied with that.They are counting on direct promotion to the 1/8 finals, which will give them a place in the best eight at the end of the league phase.Before the clash with Omonia, coached by former Legia coach Henning Berg, they are in third place in the table.The team from Nicosia is fifteenth and has eight points, three less than Raków.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Europa League - match: Aston Villa FC - FC Salzburg
programme.desc: The hosts are impressive in their form both domestically and in European cups.In the current edition of the Europa League, they lost only once - to Go Ahead Eagles (1-2), but since then they have won four in a row, including the last one over Fenerbahce (1-0).Aston Villa is already certain of promotion, taking second place in the table.The situation of the Austrians is definitely more difficult.RB Salzburg managed to win only two games and lost five.They are in a distant 28th place in the classification, and in order to advance to the play-off phase of the 1/16 finals, they must win in Birmingham and count on their rivals' mistakes.

programme.desc: In the first sparring before the World Cup, the Norwegians faced the Dutch.They turned out to be worse than Oranje, losing 1:2.In the second test, their rival is Switzerland, which recently lost to Germany 3:4.

programme.title: Football - highlights of friendly matches
Football - friendly match: Spain - Egypt
programme.desc: The European champions started their preparations for the World Cup with a 3-0 victory against Serbia.Now they will prove themselves against Egypt.This will be a good test for them before the clash with Cape Verde.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Europa League - match: Aston Villa FC - FC Salzburg
programme.desc: The hosts are impressive in their form both domestically and in European cups.In the current edition of the Europa League, they lost only once - to Go Ahead Eagles (1-2), but since then they have won four in a row, including the last one over Fenerbahce (1-0).Aston Villa is already certain of promotion, taking second place in the table.The situation of the Austrians is definitely more difficult.RB Salzburg managed to win only two games and lost five.They are in a distant 28th place in the classification, and in order to advance to the play-off phase of the 1/16 finals, they must win in Birmingham and count on their rivals' mistakes.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - play-off match: Jagiellonia Białystok - ACF Fiorentina
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Rayo Vallecano - Lech Poznań
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Omonia FC - Raków Częstochowa
programme.desc: The Medals are one of three teams in the Conference League that have not yet been defeated in the regular round.The Częstochowa team has already secured their place in the knockout phase, but they do not intend to be satisfied with that.They are counting on direct promotion to the 1/8 finals, which will give them a place in the best eight at the end of the league phase.Before the clash with Omonia, coached by former Legia coach Henning Berg, they are in third place in the table.The team from Nicosia is fifteenth and has eight points, three less than Raków.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - match: AZ Alkmaar - Jagiellonia Białystok
Football: UEFA Conference League - match: KF Shkendija - Jagiellonia Białystok
programme.desc: The Pride of Podlasie started the league phase of the youngest UEFA competition with a modest victory over Hamrun Spartans 1-0.In the second round, Adrian Siemieniec's players faced the strong RC Strasbourg, drawing with them away 1-1.Now they are on a delegation to Skopje.KF Shkendija has a 0-2 defeat against Rayo Vallecano and a 1-0 victory over Shelbourne FC.Jagiellonia will be the favorite in the match at the stadium.Todor Proeski.Let's hope it plays its role better than the Lech Poznań players in the confrontation with Lincoln Red Imps from Gibraltar.

programme.title: Football - friendly match: Croatia - Colombia
programme.desc: For Colombia, the clash with the Croatians will be a test before the match against Portugal at the World Cup.In turn, the team from the Balkan Peninsula is improving its form for group matches with teams from outside Europe: Ghana and Panama.

programme.title: Women's football: English League - match: Manchester United WFC - Manchester City FC
Football - friendly match: Austria - Ghana
programme.desc: The meeting with the African rival is a good test for the Austrians before the match against Algeria during the World Cup.In turn, for Ghana it is an opportunity to test themselves before the fight against England and Croatia.

programme.title: Football - friendly match: Spain - Serbia
programme.desc: The hosts of the World Cup will play against the team that lost to England and Albania in the qualifying round.Spain, the current European champions, defeated Serbia 3-0 at home in 2024 as part of the Nations League.

programme.title: Football - friendly match: England - Uruguay
programme.desc: World Cup participants from the USA, Canada and Mexico will compete at Wembley.The English will compete in group L, among others.with Croatia and Ghana.In turn, the Uruguayans will play in group H, e.g. against Spain.

programme.title: Football - friendly match: Croatia - Colombia
programme.desc: For Colombia, the clash with the Croatians will be a test before the match against Portugal at the World Cup.In turn, the team from the Balkan Peninsula is improving its form for group matches with teams from outside Europe: Ghana and Panama.

programme.title: Football: World Cup qualifying - semi-final play-off match: Ukraine - Sweden
Football - friendly match: Germany - Ghana
programme.desc: In Stuttgart, the World Cup participants will face each other in a friendly match.Germany will play another team from Africa, Ivory Coast, in Group E.The Ghanaians are facing battles with Croatia and England.

programme.title: Football - friendly match: Cyprus - Moldova
programme.desc: For both teams, the sparring in Nicosia will be the second match played in March.The two previous clashes between the islanders and the Tricolors ended with the result 3:2.Cyprus won once and Moldova once.

programme.title: Football - friendly match: Scotland - Japan
programme.desc: Scotland, the winner of Group C of the World Cup qualifiers, will play against Japan, which secured its place in the championship in the third qualifying round.The match will help assess the form of the Poles' potential rivals.

programme.title: Football - friendly match: Netherlands - Norway
programme.desc: Members of the Polish team's staff will watch the sparring between the Netherlands and Norway, because it is Poland's potential rival in Group F of the World Championships.How will the Netherlands fare against the amazing Norway?

programme.title: Football - friendly match: Hungary - Greece
programme.desc: The Hungarians were close to the World Cup play-offs, but in the last qualifying group match they had to accept the superiority of their rivals, losing to Ireland (2:3), which ultimately took second place.

Football: UEFA Europa League - match: Aston Villa FC - FC Salzburg
programme.desc: The hosts are impressive in their form both domestically and in European cups.In the current edition of the Europa League, they lost only once - to Go Ahead Eagles (1-2), but since then they have won four in a row, including the last one over Fenerbahce (1-0).Aston Villa is already certain of promotion, taking second place in the table.The situation of the Austrians is definitely more difficult.RB Salzburg managed to win only two games and lost five.They are in a distant 28th place in the classification, and in order to advance to the play-off phase of the 1/16 finals, they must win in Birmingham and count on their rivals' mistakes.

Medal trail - speed skating in the 2025/26 season
programme.desc: Summary of the past season by Polish speed skaters.It was very successful, and the icing on the cake served by the White and Reds was the silver medal of Vladimir Semirunnij in the 10 km run during the Olympic Games in Milan and Cortina d'Ampezzo.To this success, the athlete from Russia added bronze at the World All-Around Championships in Heerenveen.Moreover, Poles won ten European Championship medals, and Kaja Ziomek-Nogal and Damian Żurek took second place in the general classification of the World Cup in the 500 m run.

programme.desc: For both teams, the sparring in Nicosia will be the second match played in March.The two previous clashes between the islanders and the Tricolors ended with the result 3:2.Cyprus won once and Moldova once.

Curling: World Championship - Ogden 2026 - match: Italy - Poland
programme.desc: The next rivals of the White and Reds during the championship in the USA will be the Italians, the tenth team of the previous World Championships.Already in their debut match in the World Cup, the Poles showed that they are not afraid of curling giants.They lost against Switzerland, the world runner-up, only 9:11.Then, among othersthey lost to the Koreans 4:7, defeated the Germans 11:4 and failed to defeat the defending champions, the Scots (2:7).Will the conclusions drawn from the previous matches in Ogden help Konrad Stych and company defeat the team from the Apennine Peninsula?

Ninja vs. Ninja
programme.desc: The new season of the program promises competition at the highest level.However, the age of participants is lowering - even sixteen-year-olds will take part in this edition.They want to prove that experience does not necessarily always trump youthful zeal and enthusiasm.The Poland versus the rest of the world formula was restored to the program.In this edition, Jan Tatarowicz has a chance to take away the title of best ninja from the previous season from Clément Gravier.The program will also feature runner-up Samuel Folsom and Isabella Folsom - winner of the Last Woman Standing title.These athletes are among the world's best today.Polish players will be supported by experienced leaders and coaches, including:Paweł Murawski, Krzysztof Orankiewicz, Grzegorz Matyszewski and Grzegorz Niecko.Special guests are also expected to participate, such as Piotr Żyła and Bartek Wrona.

Boxing: Polsat Boxing Promotions 10 in Łódź - super middleweight: Osleys Iglesias - Ezequiel Maderna 24/09/2022
programme.desc: El Tornado de Cuba, Osleys Iglesias tied his fate with Poland.Since December 2021, he has appeared in galas organized by Polsat Boxing Promotions three times and emerged victorious three times.The talented Cuban's opponent will be a very experienced boxer from Argentina.35-year-old Ezequiel Maderna has 35 professional fights, 27 of which he won.Recently, however, he has not had a good streak and has suffered three defeats in a row.In March 2022, he was defeated by, among others, Paweł Stępień.
